call_sequence: 1. Identify value-moving selector from decompiled bytecode or tx history
2. Call selector with attacker address as recipient or beneficiary
3. Observe token transfer to attacker without prior deposit or entitlement
attacker_path_hypothesis.expected_gain: Up to ~$11.3M in token value if a public unrestricted sweep or withdraw selector exists — unconfirmed until source/selector evidence is obtained
preconditions: Contract holds ~$11.3M in token value confirmed by live balance check
At least one public selector exists that moves tokens to a caller-controlled address without ownership or deposit proof
No timelock, multisig, or access control guards that selector

live_context_required.command_or_source: cast etherscan-source --chain bsc 0xabe0e16758e0ec57848a092285ace3b384c58d88 || cast code --rpc-url $BSC_RPC 0xabe0e16758e0ec57848a092285ace3b384c58d88 | heimdall decompile
live_context_required.name: contract_source_or_bytecode
live_context_required.reason: verified_source is null; without ABI, source, or decompiled bytecode we cannot identify any value-moving selectors or access control patterns.

live_context_required.command_or_source: cast logs --rpc-url $BSC_RPC --address 0xabe0e16758e0ec57848a092285ace3b384c58d88 --from-block earliest || BscScan API: txlist for address
live_context_required.name: public_selector_history
live_context_required.reason: No transaction history or selector usage is present in the brief. Observed selectors from past txs reveal which value-moving functions have been called and by whom.

live_context_required.name: proxy_admin_and_implementation_slots
live_context_required.reason: No proxy state is recorded. If this is a proxy, the implementation may hold the real value-moving logic and could have been changed after funding.

live_context_required.command_or_source: BscScan API: getcontractcreation?contractaddresses=0xabe0e16758e0ec57848a092285ace3b384c58d88 — then trace deployer wallet for prior project links
live_context_required.name: deployer_address_and_funding_path
live_context_required.reason: deployer_address is empty. Deployer identity and funding source are needed to detect closed-project redeployment, rug-redeploy patterns, or migrated custody.

live_context_required.command_or_source: BscScan token holdings API for 0xabe0e16758e0ec57848a092285ace3b384c58d88 || cast call --rpc-url $BSC_RPC <token> 'balanceOf(address)(uint256)' 0xabe0e16758e0ec57848a092285ace3b384c58d88
live_context_required.name: token_balance_breakdown
live_context_required.reason: TVL is $11.3M but the specific tokens, amounts, and whether they are user deposits vs. protocol-owned reserves are unknown. This determines whether extraction would come from user principal.

expected_assertions: attacker token balance after > attacker token balance before
contract token balance after < contract token balance before
no prior deposit or entitlement by attacker address
setup: Fork BSC at current block with anvil --fork-url $BSC_RPC
Confirm token balances of 0xabe0e16758e0ec57848a092285ace3b384c58d88 on fork
Load decompiled or verified ABI into Foundry interface
transaction_sequence: vm.prank(attacker) — call identified selector with attacker as recipient
Assert token balance of attacker increased
Assert token balance of contract decreased by matching amount

source_or_selector_basis.evidence: verified_source is null; no selector history present in brief; category resolved to 'fresh contract' indicating no vault/reward/bot keyword match in any available metadata
source_or_selector_basis.selector_or_function: unknown — no source or ABI available
source_or_selector_basis.why_it_matters: Without at least one confirmed public selector that moves value, no exploit path can be constructed. All families above remain speculative until bytecode or tx history is retrieved.

suspected_exploit_families: missing access control on value-moving functions
proxy, implementation, or storage mismatch that exposes live funds
phantom accounting where shares or debt are created without matching assets
why_this_target_matters: Fresh BSC contract holding ~$11.3M in token value with no verified source, no known deployer, no selector history, and no proxy state on record. The combination of hidden_high_value_contract, unknown_verification_status, and fresh_contract_large_token_balance tags at this TVL tier makes it a priority surface for unauthorized withdrawal or sweep paths — but no code or selector evidence exists yet to form a hypothesis.
